initiatives.title: Participatory Research Equity Initiative
initiatives.summary: Community-governed research agenda ensuring marginalized populations co-design study priorities and benefit-sharing.

initiatives.title: Open Data Infrastructure Program
initiatives.summary: Interoperable open-data platform with standardized APIs, persistent identifiers, and read/write citizen access.

initiatives.title: Interdisciplinary Science Corridors
initiatives.summary: Cross-department science corridors linking Protocol, Education, and Infrastructure to accelerate applied research.

policy.title: Responsible AI Research Charter
policy.summary: Mandatory ethical review, algorithmic impact disclosures, and public audit pathways for all AI research programs.

policy.title: Citizen Science Participation Standard
policy.summary: Formalized contribution, attribution, and reward mechanisms for citizen-led research activities.

policy.title: Dual-Use Technology Review Policy
policy.summary: Risk-tiered review framework for emerging technologies crossing civil, commercial, and security boundaries.

standards.title: Open Access Publication Standard
standards.summary: All publicly funded research outputs must be published in open-access venues within 12 months.

standards.title: FAIR Data Stewardship Standard
standards.summary: Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, Reusable requirements for all ministry datasets and research artifacts.

standards.title: Research Citation & Attribution Standard
standards.summary: Persistent identifier schema, citation formatting, and contributor taxonomy for Aetheria research outputs.
